📚 Join the #1 community for AI entrepreneurs and connect with 290k+ members: https://bit.ly/4rSJfaL
🤝 Ready to transform your business with AI? Let's talk: https://bit.ly/4s2dOuV

Claude Code Remote Control dropped and everyone's treating it like a coding feature — I've been using it to run 4 companies from my phone. In this video, I queue 3 real tasks on camera (a marketing audit, a lead magnet, and a month of sales call analysis) and show the finished results at the end. The secret is what I call an AI Operating System: three layers (Context OS, Data OS, Intel OS) that give your AI agents real business context, live analytics from tools like Google Sheets, YouTube Analytics, Bitly, and Calendly, and strategic insights pulled from meeting transcripts via Fireflies and Fathom. Without the system, Remote Control is useless. With it, you're not coding from your phone. You're operating your entire business from it. Free Telegram + Claude Code setup guide included.

Whether you run an e-commerce brand, a service business, an agency, or a SaaS, this video proves that Claude Code isn't a coding tool — it's an AI Operating System any founder can use to reclaim time, automate operations, and build a durable competitive edge.

Voice to text: https://ref.wisprflow.ai/nateherk

Claude Code just released auto mode, a new permission setting that sits between "ask before every edit" and "dangerously skip permissions." 

Instead of stopping your workflow every few seconds or giving Claude free rein to do anything, auto mode uses a classifier to check each action for risk before executing it. Safe actions run automatically, risky ones get flagged. In this video I break down how it works, test it with some real examples, and show you how to turn it on.

title: What Is an AI Operating System? (And Why Every Business Will Need One)
content_summary:
⚙️ WORKSHOP: Build an AI Operating System for Your Business in 7 Days: https://bit.ly/what-is-aios-workshop
📈 Get daily AIOS Workshops from me in my Accelerator: https://bit.ly/4bcfiLS

📚 Join the #1 community for AI entrepreneurs and connect with 300k+ members: https://bit.ly/4cz7kyK
🤝 Ready to transform your business with AI? Let's talk: https://bit.ly/4cz7mGS
📋 Get our FREE 14-day playbook for finding high-impact AI opportunities in any business: https://bit.ly/14-day-playbook-

My Vlog/BTS Channel: https://bit.ly/LiamOttleyVlogs

Most founders are stuck spending 80% of their time working IN their business — keeping things running — and only 20% working ON it, which means new products, new markets, and new revenue streams rarely get the attention they need. In this video, I go to the whiteboard and break down exactly what an AI Operating System (AIOS) is, how it's structured in layers around your existing business model, and why it's the methodology that flips that ratio for good. I cover the full AIOS framework, the difference between automating tasks and augmenting your work, why this is nothing like ChatGPT, and the three KPIs every founder should be tracking to know whether their AI operating system is actually working: away-from-desk autonomy, task automation percentage, and revenue per employee. If you're a founder, entrepreneur, or business owner looking to use AI to build a more efficient business, reduce busywork, and finally free up the bandwidth to grow — this is the clearest explanation of AIOS I've put together yet.

⏱️ Timestamps:
0:00 – What is an AI Operating System?
1:32 – AIOS is a methodology, not a business model
2:12 – Building in layers, not leaps
3:35 – Why this is nothing like ChatGPT
5:32 – The bandwidth trap: working IN vs ON your business
10:47 – The five layers of AIOS explained
14:47 – The automate layer: how to do a task audit
20:24 – The 3 KPIs of an AI Operating System

If you're hitting session limits in Claude Code, this video breaks down exactly how tokens actually work and the habits that will stop you from burning through them. 

I cover context rot, manual compaction, the rewind feature, sub agents, markdown conversions, and a free token dashboard I built so you can see where your tokens are really going. By the end you'll know when to clear, when to chain sessions, and why the 1 million token window is insurance, not a goal to fill.
